title: gitzip Manifest v2
description: Manifest file that must be included inside every .gitzip drop-*.zip envelope. Defines which files to deploy, where they go, and optional integrity checks.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this envelope was created.

target_branch.description: Target branch to deploy files into. Informational — the Action deploys to the branch the zip was pushed to.

commit_message.description: Human-readable commit message describing what this drop deploys.

artifact_type.description: Optional type hint for the artifact payload.

dry_run.description: If true, the unpack action validates and logs but does not write files or commit. Useful for testing manifests.

allow_workflow_writes.description: If true, allows writing to .github/workflows/**. Requires explicit opt-in because workflow files can execute arbitrary code. Default false.

files.description: List of files to deploy from the zip into the repo.

src.description: Path to the file inside the zip archive (relative to zip root).

dest.description: Destination path inside the repo (relative to repo root). Must not be absolute, contain .., start with .git/, .gitzip/, or _gitzip/.

sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 hex digest of the source file. If provided, the unpack step verifies integrity before deploying.

size.description: Optional byte size of the source file. If provided, the unpack step verifies size before deploying.
